channel.title: Flutter Tools and Productivity :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Flutter exercises on code generation, advanced dependency injection, flavors, and productivity tools for production-ready projects.

item.title: CI/CD with GitHub Actions in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter CI/CD exercise with GitHub Actions: static analysis, tests, APK and IPA builds, Dart version matrix, and automatic deployment.

item.title: Flutter Flavors dev, staging and prod: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise to configure dev/staging/prod environments with dart-define: different API URLs, app names, and conditional logging per environment.

item.title: Freezed and json_serializable in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for immutable models with Freezed: automatic copyWith, fromJson/toJson, union types, and step-by-step build_runner setup.

item.title: json_serializable with build_runner in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise to auto-generate fromJson and toJson with json_serializable and build_runner, without Freezed.

item.title: Linting and analysis_options in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for strict linting with analysis_options.yaml, flutter_lints and very_good_analysis: recommended rules and how to apply them.
